children.heading: Regulations
children.label: a Regulations
children.text: Not later than 540 days after , the Secretary shall issue proposed regulations to carry out this chapter.November 28, 1990

children.heading: Technical and other assistance
children.label: 1 Technical and other assistance
children.text: The Secretary shall provide technical, administrative, and National Institute of Food and Agriculture assistance to assist States in the implementation of an organic certification program under this chapter.

children.heading: Financial assistance
children.label: 2 Financial assistance
children.text: The Secretary may provide financial assistance to any State that implements an organic certification program under this chapter.

children.heading: Access to data documentation systems
children.label: c Access to data documentation systems
children.text: The Secretary shall have access to available data from cross-border documentation systems administered by other Federal agencies, including the Automated Commercial Environment system of U.S. Customs and Border Protection.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than , and annually thereafter through , the Secretary shall submit to Congress, and make publicly available on the website of the Department of Agriculture, a report describing national organic program activities with respect to all domestic and overseas investigations and compliance actions taken pursuant to this chapter during the preceding year.March 1, 2020March 1, 2023

children.heading: Requirements
children.label: 2 Requirements
children.text: The data described in paragraph (1) shall be broken down by agricultural product, quantity, value, and month.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: Any data determined by the Secretary to be confidential business information shall not be provided in the report under paragraph (1).
